title: [Cookie Banner] Verify that clicking the GDPR & US State Laws consent template option opens an upgrade nudge on free or basic plans
customPreconds: User is on Cookie Banner > Layout tab (or General tab where the Consent Template selector is visible). Account is on a free or basic plan. Consent Template is currently set to GDPR or US State Laws.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click the Consent Template dropdown to open the template switcher.
customStepsSeparated.expected: A dropdown appears with GDPR, US State Laws, and GDPR & US State Laws options listed.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click the GDPR & US State Laws option.
customStepsSeparated.expected: An upgrade nudge appears. The active consent template does not change — it remains at its previous value. No banner preview update occurs.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify the upgrade nudge content and CTA.
customStepsSeparated.expected: The nudge indicates that GDPR & US State Laws requires a higher-tier plan. An upgrade CTA button is visible.
